title: Legacy Blog

content:
Namaste 🙏 , I’m Lokesh
A Software Engineer based in Chandigarh, India 🇮🇳 currently focusing on Blockchain and other decentralized tech. I am always looking to learn and expand my skill set.
I created this website to document my journey and share some insights with the world.
